title: Execution Quality Heatmap — Time-of-Day Slippage Dashboard
summary: Build a simple analytics view from TCA logger data (Feature 2) showing mean slippage in bps as a heatmap by hour-of-day and by symbol. This converts raw TCA log data into actionable visualisation — the same feedback loop that professional desks use to tune execution strategies. For Decifer specifically, this also builds the foundation for the per-user dashboard requirement in the future roadmap.
expected_impact: Surfaces which time slots, symbols, and order types produce the worst fills; enables data-driven refinement of execution parameters; industry TCA data shows slippage patterns are highly non-uniform across the day and discovering them typically yields 3–8 bps improvement once acted upon
deferral_reason: not in paper_trading_single_account Active pipeline — deferred for future stage review
